victoria-2026-rifai-raheem-tarneit.summary: Rifai Raheem is a community advocate with over 30 years of volunteer service and a former union organiser in the tertiary education sector who has worked at Victoria University; he holds qualifications in agricultural science and entrepreneurship. He led community projects including the Melbourne Grand Mosque and the WIC Early Learning Centre, and has lived in Tarneit for 17 years.
